name: 20V Cordless Random Orbital Sander
tagline: Cordless 20V MAX random orbital sander with 5 inch hook & loop pad. Delivers 8,000-12,000 OPM for professional finishing results without the constraint of a power cord. Ideal for on-site sanding, surface preparation, and finishing work.
description: Cordless 20V MAX random orbital sander with 5 inch hook & loop pad. Delivers 8,000-12,000 OPM for professional finishing results without the constraint of a power cord. Ideal for on-site sanding, surface preparation, and finishing work.
userBenefits: Brushless motor delivers up to 40% more runtime per charge and longer motor life than brushed alternatives
Cordless 20V MAX platform eliminates power cord tangles and enables sanding anywhere on the jobsite
Variable speed 8,000-12,000 OPM matches sanding aggressiveness to the task for optimal finish quality
Compatible with the full Ningbo Siyang 20V MAX battery system for cross-tool battery sharing
Lightweight 3.5 lbs design with compact 6.8" length provides comfortable one-handed operation
